name: Fleet compliance officers managing 10-50 vehicles tool
description: For fleet compliance officers processing 10-50 vehicles, missed registration renewals cause compliance penalties. We automate reminders instead of manual tracking using spreadsheets or calendars.
problem_solved: Difficulty in tracking and scheduling vehicle registration renewals
features: Simple dashboard to view registration status
Ability to log and track renewal history
